title: centaurium minus
intro: Centaurium minus, also known as the lesser centaury or mountain love, is a perennial plant species in the gentian family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centaurium minus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Centaurium minus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
